en: you had it, and we're too embarrassed to say, and we get to kill you.
ko: 언젠가 당신이 이 펜을 가지고 있다는 걸 깨닫고 말하기 부끄러웠다는 뜻이야. 그래서 우리는 당신을 죽일 수 있어.

en: I'm not hiding my own pen, you paranoid weirdo.
ko: 나는 내 펜을 숨기고 있지 않아, 너는 편집증 환자야.

en: Everybody stay within each other's eye lines, please. One of you's a monster. Me next, right? Hold on!
ko: 모두 서로의 시야 안에 있어 주세요.

en: Can we please consider the threshold that we are crossing?
ko: 우리가 넘어가고 있는 경계를 고려해 볼 수 있을까요?

en: We don't trust Abed. He shredded my backpack.
He freed my pet monkey. Because we corrupted him. He's our innocent.
He put gum in your hair. Empty the bag, Abed. Uh, Pierce? You don't have a bag?
Giraffe. Uh, Jeff? You don't have a bag?
ko: 이봐, 제프, 가방이 없어요? 아, 나는 세상을

en: Oh, I could never deprive the world of the portion of my chest a strap would cover.
ko: 내 가슴을 가릴 스트랩 없이 두고 싶지 않아. 이해가 돼.

en: Makes sense. So what's left? Shirley, a little hugging and crying, and then we're done? Wait, Abed.
Why is my name in here? That's mine.
ko: 왜 내 이름이 여기 있어? 이건 내 거야.

en: And Shirley's, and Annie's. What is it? Charts?
Some kind of calendar? That's my personal private business.
Annie, four on, 28 off. Next, November 10th.
Britta, five on, 27 off. Oh, my God.
Are you charting our menstrual cycles? What?
ko: 세상에, 우리 생리 주기를 기록하고 있는 거야?
